'''竏喩-th-d-z''' ('''kagathdezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calliper|calliper]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-th-d-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calliper|calliper]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喩-th-d-z
|-
! Lemma
| kagathdezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigathdezoko|thigathdezoko]] || [[word:jigathdezoko|jigathdezoko]] || [[word:shigathdezoko|shigathdezoko]] || [[word:kigathdezoko|kigathdezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugathdezoko|thuthugathdezoko]] || [[word:jujugathdezoko|jujugathdezoko]] || [[word:shushugathdezoko|shushugathdezoko]] || [[word:kukugathdezoko|kukugathdezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugathdezoko|thugathdezoko]] || [[word:jugathdezoko|jugathdezoko]] || [[word:shugathdezoko|shugathdezoko]] || [[word:kugathdezoko|kugathdezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugathdezoko|thugathdezoko]] || [[word:jugathdezoko|jugathdezoko]] || [[word:shugathdezoko|shugathdezoko]] || [[word:kugathdezoko|kugathdezoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogathdezoko|thogathdezoko]] || [[word:jogathdezoko|jogathdezoko]] || [[word:shogathdezoko|shogathdezoko]] || [[word:kogathdezoko|kogathdezoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogathdezoko|thogathdezoko]] || [[word:jogathdezoko|jogathdezoko]] || [[word:shogathdezoko|shogathdezoko]] || [[word:kogathdezoko|kogathdezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦgathdezoko|thﾃｦgathdezoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦgathdezoko|jﾃｦgathdezoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦgathdezoko|shﾃｦgathdezoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦgathdezoko|kﾃｦgathdezoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagathdezoko|thagathdezoko]] || [[word:jagathdezoko|jagathdezoko]] || [[word:shagathdezoko|shagathdezoko]] || [[word:kagathdezoko|kagathdezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagathdezoko|thagathdezoko]] || [[word:jagathdezoko|jagathdezoko]] || [[word:shagathdezoko|shagathdezoko]] || [[word:kagathdezoko|kagathdezoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
